summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Core Technologies tabbed sections, unique case studies, industry pages with 12+ sections, solution pages with 11+ sections, about page, careers page, and blog detail features

design_issues.issue: Table of Contents sidebar not consistently visible on all blog articles

passed_tests: Service page /services/artificial-intelligence has Core Technologies with 6 tabs (Text Models, Image & Video, ML Frameworks, MLOps, Data & ETL, Cloud & Deploy)
Service page /services/generative-ai has Core Technologies with 6 tabs (Foundation Models, RAG Frameworks, Vector Databases, Embeddings, Agent Frameworks, Deployment)
Core Technologies tabs switch content correctly when clicked
Service pages have unique case studies - AI service has fraud detection, inventory management, predictive maintenance, churn prediction cases
Generative AI service has unique case studies - Enterprise Knowledge Copilot, AI Content Generation Platform, AI-Powered Code Review Tool, Multilingual Customer Support Bot
Industry page /industries/healthcare has 13 sections meeting 12+ requirement
Industry page /industries/retail has 13 sections meeting 12+ requirement
Industry pages have Services Offered grid with 8 service cards each
Industry pages have Tech Stack sections with 4 technology categories each
Solution page /solutions/databrain-ai has 11+ functional sections meeting requirement
About page has 11 sections meeting requirement with timeline, team members, offices, and contact form
Careers page has 9 sections meeting requirement with job filtering and expandable job cards
Blog detail page has share buttons and author bio sections
All interactive elements (tabs, accordions, filters, job cards) work correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Blog detail page Table of Contents sidebar is not consistently visible across all blog articles. Consider ensuring TOC sidebar appears on all blog detail pages as specified in requirements.
